---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for macowl
title: "[Idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What do you want macowl to do?**
A simple description of your idea.

**Why is it useful?**
Tell us the problem it solves for you.

**Any other thoughts?**
Anything else you want to add. Remember, macowl likes to stay small and simple.
